"""Convert marc21 metadata"""

from flask_babelex import gettext as _

from . import config



[docs]class InvenioMarc21(object):
    """invenio-records-marc21 extension."""

    def __init__(self, app=None):
        """Extension initialization."""
        # TODO: This is an example of translation string with comment. Please
        # remove it.
        # NOTE: This is a note to a translator.
        _("A translation string")
        if app:
            self.init_app(app)


[docs]    def init_app(self, app):
        """Flask application initialization."""
        self.init_config(app)
        app.extensions["invenio-records-marc21"] = self



[docs]    def init_config(self, app):
        """Initialize configuration."""
        # Use theme's base template if theme is installed
        if "BASE_TEMPLATE" in app.config:
            app.config.setdefault(
                "INVENIO_RECORDS_MARC21_BASE_TEMPLATE",
                app.config["BASE_TEMPLATE"],
            )
        for k in dir(config):
            if k.startswith("INVENIO_RECORDS_MARC21_"):
                app.config.setdefault(k, getattr(config, k))
